name: Lettuce Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion in butter until gently golden.
2. Stir in flour, salt, nutmeg, and pepper.
3. Dissolve bouillon cubes in boiling water; add to onion mixture slowly.
4. Cook over medium heat.
5. Stir until thickened.
6. Add lettuce. Cover and let cook 3 minutes.
7. Mix together egg yolk and cream.
8. Stir 1/4 cup soup into yolk-cream mixture.
9. Pour mixture into soup, stirring constantly.
10. Cook over low heat, stirring, until soup comes to a boil.
11. Remove from heat. Serve at once.
